thesis_hint: Recent 3-cycle quality is improving then stabilising (0.0000 -> 0.5323 -> 0.5323), so exploration is allowed. Target UMA 1h instead of BABY: funding is deeply negative (-0.00119) with decent opportunity score, but crowding/fee drag should be lower than BABY. Design a post-liquidation reclaim long that only arms after downside exhaustion plus reclaim above a fast trend anchor, with a hard veto on entries during flat ranging drift and no passive dip-buying. Keep the shape tighter than the failed BABY reclaim ideas: require structure recovery before entry and avoid transitional bleed.
stop_condition: Stop when any variant reaches QScore >= 1.0 with >= 18 trades and max_drawdown_pct <= 8.0; abort any variant with total_trades < 15, profit_factor < 1.08, ranging profit_factor < 1.00, or transitional profit_factor < 0.95.
